description: A planner needs to check the current inventory level of a bulk storage tank to see if a new delivery can be scheduled.

nodes.task_description: Identify the bulk tank for the specific raw material.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the tank ID.

nodes.task_description: Query the process control system for the current level of the tank.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the current level as '65% full'.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the remaining space (ullage) in the tank and determine if it's enough to receive a full tanker truck delivery.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates that there is enough room for a standard delivery and notifies procurement to place an order.
